content: Just as language learning 'reflexion' (reflection) helps high school students correct grammatical errors and deepen conceptual understanding by comparing their output against standard models, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow the scaffolded vocabulary learning framework from high school language education to systematically grade and improve their own reasoning outputs. This framing reframes LLM self-reflection not as a novel AI innovation, but as a guided learning practice identical to how humans build meta-cognitive skill.
